name: Performapal Card Gardna
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カード・ガードナー
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up Defense Position monster you control; its DEF becomes equal to the combined original DEF of all face-up Defense Position monsters you currently control (even if this card leaves the field).

[ Monster Effect ] 
Gains DEF equal to the combined original DEF of all other "Performapal" monsters you control.
pend_eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up Defense Position monster you control; its DEF becomes equal to the combined original DEF of all face-up Defense Position monsters you currently control (even if this card leaves the field).
mnst_eff: Gains DEF equal to the combined original DEF of all other "Performapal" monsters you control.
eff: Gains DEF equal to the combined original DEF of all other "Performapal" monsters you control.
